title: Salvage & Repair
description: Recover, repair, and profit! Salvage & Repair is an addon for Management Wanted.
body:
Salvage & Repair is an addon for Management Wanted focused on recovering and restoring abandoned animatronics.

Instead of managing abandoned buildings, players can now search for damaged animatronics, salvage their parts, perform repairs, and return them to operational condition. Every successful restoration rewards the player, creating a new gameplay loop centered around recovery, maintenance, and profit.

Features

🤖 Animatronic Salvaging

Discover damaged and abandoned animatronics.
Recover valuable machines that would otherwise be lost.

🔧 Repair System

Restore animatronics using resources and components.
Bring broken units back to full functionality.

💰 Earn Rewards

Receive payments and rewards for every successful repair.
Turn restoration work into a profitable business.

⚙️ New Gameplay Loop

Search → Salvage → Repair → Profit.
Adds a fresh management-focused experience to the game.

🌎 Enhanced World Interaction

Gives players new objectives beyond building and management.
Encourages exploration and resource gathering.
Perfect For
Management Wanted players looking for new activities.
Roleplay and economy servers.
Fans of animatronics and restoration gameplay.
Players who enjoy progression-based mechanics.

Whether you're a skilled technician or an ambitious entrepreneur, Salvage & Repair lets you build a thriving business by giving damaged animatronics a second chance.
